# Advice for the Young Scientist

*Original link:* http://yamlb.wordpress.com/2006/04/03/advice-for-the-young-scientist/  
*pubDate:* Mon, 03 Apr 2006 17:37:28 +0000  
*post_id:* 37  
*status:* publish  
*type:* post

**Content (verbatim)**

To change from bayesian statistics, I found this page dealing with some [Advice for the Young Scientist](http://math.ucr.edu/home/baez/advice.html), written by John Baez in 2003.
Citation:

- Keep your soul
- Go to the most prestigious school.
- Work with the best possible advisor
- Publish.
- Go to conferences.
- Give Good Talks
